name: Phorest Salon Software API
what_it_does: Enterprise salon and spa management platform with REST API — enabling hair salons, spas, and beauty businesses to manage appointments, client records, staff scheduling, POS/payments, inventory, marketing (email/SMS), and business analytics, with API access for custom integrations and partner ecosystem connections.
use_cases: Integrating Phorest appointment data via API for CRM and business intelligence systems
Managing salon staff schedules via Phorest API for workforce management automation
Syncing client purchase history via Phorest API for loyalty program integration
Accessing salon analytics via Phorest API for multi-location performance dashboards
Building partner integrations via Phorest API for complementary beauty tech tools
not_for: Small solo practitioners (Phorest is enterprise/multi-location focused — use Fresha or Booksy for solo)
Non-beauty businesses needing general appointment scheduling
best_when: An enterprise hair salon group or spa chain needs comprehensive business management with advanced analytics, marketing automation, and API integration for their tech stack.
avoid_when: You're a solo practitioner or small single-location business — Phorest's complexity and pricing targets enterprise chains.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for partner integrations. Client credentials or authorization code flow depending on use case. API access via Phorest developer program. Webhooks for appointment, client, and purchase events. Webhook signature validation for security. Phorest API requires partner onboarding — not self-serve. Contact dev@phorest.com for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier for business subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing — custom quote for chains; estimated $250-$500+/month per location
pricing.notes: Irish company (Dublin). Founded 2006 by Ronan Perceval and Declan Doyle. €30M+ revenue. 6,000+ salons in Ireland, UK, US, Australia, Canada, South Africa, Germany. Enterprise focus: used by top 10% of salons by revenue. Brand Loyalty program (points, gifts). Smart Decisions analytics (advanced). Staff scheduling with skills-based matching. POS and payment processing. Marketing Suite: SMS, email, social. Online booking for consumers. API partner program for software integrators. Invested in innovation: AI appointment recommendations. Strong Irish government startup support background.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OAuth2 partner access. Webhooks with signatures. Irish company (GDPR). Enterprise pricing. Partner program required. developers.phorest.com portal. Not self-serve API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Appointment reads idempotent by ID. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers (at-least-once delivery). Limited documentation makes full assessment difficult.
known_agent_gotchas: API requires partner program — contact dev@phorest.com for developer access
Not self-serve: enterprise partner onboarding process required for API access
Irish company — strong GDPR compliance; EU/UK/IE data residency
Enterprise pricing: typically annual contracts for salon chains — not SMB pricing
Webhook signature validation required — verify webhook authenticity before processing
Multi-location management: clinic/branch hierarchy must be navigated for chain operations

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with scopes. Webhook signature validation. GDPR compliant (Irish company). Client PII and payment data in salon records. EU/UK/IE data residency. Enterprise partner onboarding reduces anonymous API risk. Annual contracts for enterprise — stable vendor relationship. Irish startup ecosystem support.
